findings.title: GraphQL introspection is enabled in production config
findings.message: GraphQL introspection is enabled. Introspection allows clients to query the full schema, exposing all types, fields, and relationships. Disable introspection in production to prevent information disclosure and reconnaissance attacks.

findings.title: SQL string concatenation in GraphQL resolver
findings.message: SQL query built with template literal inside GraphQL resolver 'user'. This enables SQL injection attacks through GraphQL arguments. Use parameterized queries or ORM methods.

findings.title: GraphQL server has no query depth limit
findings.message: GraphQL server instantiation detected without depth limiting configuration. Without depthLimit or maxDepth, deeply nested queries can cause exponential resource consumption and denial of service.
